creator: ports@caomhin.org
text:
New port - a customisable shopping cart application for integration with the Django framework

Fix: Note: this port depends on some pending ports and will logically fail if attempted without the following PRs.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=140824
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141301
